description: Weekly rotating dessert menu showcases featuring new or seasonal sweet items with detailed flavor descriptions, emoji accents, and date ranges. Positions treats as shareable luxuries and conversation starters.
structural_recipe: Lead with emotional hook ('will change you', 'perfect menu', 'share with'). Display rotating menu theme with emojis for visual hierarchy. List 2-4 desserts with creative names and detailed sensory descriptions (textures, flavors, ingredients). Include date range for weekly availability (e.g., 'Mar 9-14'). Use heart emojis and warm colors to emphasize indulgence. Optional: tie to occasions (holidays, seasons, special moments).
why_it_works: Saudi audiences engage heavily with premium food content, particularly desserts which hold cultural significance in hospitality and celebration. Detailed descriptions trigger desire and FOMO, while weekly rotation creates urgency and repeat visits. Emoji-rich formatting suits social media scanning habits. Positioning treats as 'shareable' aligns with communal/family dining values in Saudi culture.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure halal certification is visible or implied for Saudi compliance
Avoid alcohol references in flavor names or descriptions
Consider timing around Ramadan (intermittent fasting patterns shift content effectiveness)
High-sugar indulgence content may face criticism; balance with health-conscious framing when needed
Respect prayer times in scheduling posts for maximum engagement
cultural_constraints: Avoid imagery conflicting with Islamic values
